tagline: Write Less. Connect More. Grow Faster.

scenes.label: HOOK
scenes.voiceover: You built something great. But no one's opening your emails.
scenes.visual_description: Tired female entrepreneur late at night, cluttered desk, cold blue screen glow, defeated expression, 9% open rate visible on screen

scenes.label: SOLUTION
scenes.voiceover: AutoMail uses AI to write personalized campaigns that actually get read — in minutes.
scenes.visual_description: Amazed entrepreneur discovering AutoMail interface, dark navy UI with orange accents, golden office light, expression of relief and excitement

scenes.label: BENEFITS
scenes.voiceover: Three times higher open rates. Five hours saved every week. Real results — zero writing skills needed.
scenes.visual_description: Diverse team celebrating over analytics dashboard showing 3x email open rate spike, city skyline office, warm golden light, arms raised in victory

scenes.label: CTA
scenes.voiceover: Start free today. Your next campaign writes itself.
scenes.visual_description: Sleek laptop on marble desk showing AutoMail app with glowing orange CTA button, floating email particles, premium dark studio background
